history.text: The Acts of Union brought Ireland into the United Kingdom ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
The Easter Rising became a turning point in the independence movement.
The Irish Free State was established, giving Ireland a new political framework.
Ireland formally became a republic introduced a new form of state rule.
Ireland joined the European Economic Community appears in Ireland's historical record.

worthSeeing.title: Wild Atlantic Way:
worthSeeing.text: A 2,500 km coastal drive from Donegal to Cork past cliffs and beaches.

worthSeeing.title: Cliffs of Moher:
worthSeeing.text: 700-year-old sea cliffs rising 214 m above the Atlantic on the west coast.

worthSeeing.title: Dublin Pub Culture:
worthSeeing.text: Literary pubs of Temple Bar, Guinness Storehouse and live trad music.
